title: Saturday Faculty Training
description: Monthly training session for new and returning chapter volunteers. Covers Scratch, Python basics, and classroom management strategies.

title: Beall Elementary STEM Fair
description: End-of-semester showcase where students present their coding projects to parents, teachers, and the community.

title: Middle School Coding Challenge
description: Friendly competition between Guillen and Henderson Middle School chapters. Students solve coding puzzles and present a mini-project.

title: AI Exploration Workshop
description: A half-day workshop introducing students to AI concepts, machine learning basics, and responsible AI use — no prior coding experience needed.

title: Saturday Faculty Training
description: Summer session covering advanced topics: data science basics, robotics curriculum, and assessment strategies.

title: Fall 2026 Chapter Launch Day
description: Kick-off day for all Fall 2026 chapters. CodeCore volunteers visit partner schools for a first-session icebreaker and intro to coding.
